final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing technical infographic of a Sony A7 camera with all parts labeled by name.

Style/medium: clean technical illustration with exploded-view diagram, isometric perspective, reminiscent of Haynes manual diagrams or iFixit teardown visuals
Composition: central exploded view with camera body at center, parts radiating outward in layers, labels connected by thin leader lines, ample white space for readability
Subject: Sony A7 mirrorless camera deconstructed into component parts including sensor, shutter mechanism, EVF, LCD screen, battery, lens mount, dials, buttons, and internal circuit boards
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray gradient background, no environmental context, pure technical documentation style
Lighting/mood: soft even studio lighting from top-left, minimal shadows, clinical and educational mood
Color palette: metallic silver and black for camera parts, blue accent for highlights, dark gray text for labels, white background
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum for body shell, matte black plastic for grip, glass for sensor cover, visible screw heads and connectors
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7"
Constraints: all major components must be clearly separated and labeled with readable part names; diagram must function as educational reference
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, cluttered composition, missing labels, copyright Sony logos, 3D render stuffer aesthetic, gradients on parts
